title: Friendgroup create server
description: Mainly based around Create and Warium VS but has a couple other things.
body:
## Welcome
### Features
This modpack Features mainly The Create mod and a ton of its addons. It also adds other cool mods like: Villager Recruits,Villager Workers and Xaero's Minimap and world map. This Modpack also features mods that add vehicles like Immersive Aircraft, and Small Ships. This also includes Valkyrien Skies and Warium. There's Not many QoL mods but currently we have Serene Seasons and Nature's Spirit.

### Why download this?
Supposedly your're looking for a cool modpack with a bunch of cool mods, or maybe just browsing. Well if you're looking for a modpack that has well over 10 create mod additions in create 6.0.8, and has survival-friendly Valkyrien mods. Congrats, This ModPack is for you.
Whether this is used for our server or not, We hope you have a fun time with this modpack.

### Info
- This modpack is built for my friendgroup's server PC that we host an smp on.
- This is a decently heavy modpack with around 150 mods.
- I am always trying bug fix whenever there is a bug.
